center.name: 西岸大区
center.summary: 西岸大区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括白眶几维，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in a restricted area of the Ōkārito forest on the West Coast of New Zealand's South Island, and has a population of only about 600 birds

links.label: 分布于
